title: Minecart Splitting
description: Adds crafting recipes for allowing the split of minecarts
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc598c003fe27d66a23ca2419034ce759f32ffa.png)

[![github](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/Oth3r/MinecartSplitting?label=Issues)](https://github.com/Oth3r/MinecartSplitting/issues) [![discord](https://dcbadge.vercel.app/api/server/Mec6yNQ9B7?style=flat)](https://www.oth3r.one/discord) 

[![modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/minecart-splitting?label=Modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/directionhud) [![curseforge](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/1098273.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecart-splitting)
\
Stuck with alot of minecarts crafted into contraptions?
\
Your in luck! This mod makes it possible to uncraft those pesky minecarts!


## Known Compatibilities
Create an issue on Github or a ticket on discord to add more mods to support!
\
![Fabric Compatibilities](https://github.com/Oth3r/MinecartSplitting/blob/master/fabric/fabric-compatibilities.png?raw=true)
